name: Jedox Planning and Analytics REST API
what_it_does: Jedox planning and analytics REST API for finance, sales, and HR teams to build and run multi-dimensional planning models, automate budgeting and forecasting workflows, manage OLAP cubes, and integrate planning data with ERP and BI systems — enabling automated financial planning, data integration, and analytics reporting through Jedox's AI-infused planning platform combining Excel familiarity with enterprise-grade OLAP processing. Enables AI agents to manage OLAP cube for multi-dimensional financial planning model automation, handle data integration for ERP and source system data loading automation, access cell write-back for planning data input and update automation, retrieve calculation for planning model computation trigger automation, manage reporting for financial report generation and distribution automation, handle dimension for planning hierarchy management automation, access workflow for budgeting approval and review process automation, retrieve sandbox for planning scenario creation and analysis automation, manage data export for planning result extraction automation, and integrate Jedox with SAP, Oracle, and data warehouse systems for end-to-end connected planning automation.
use_cases: Automating data integration from ERP into Jedox financial planning models for FP&A automation agents
Triggering OLAP cube calculations and refreshes for period-end planning cycle automation agents
Writing planning data back to Jedox cubes for automated budget update workflows automation agents
Extracting planning results and scenarios for reporting and analytics integration automation agents
not_for: Operational transactional processing (Jedox is planning and analytics, not ERP transactions)
Real-time operational dashboards (Jedox is planning cycles, not sub-second operational monitoring)
Small business budgeting (Jedox targets mid-market to enterprise with complex planning needs)
best_when: A mid-market or enterprise finance team wanting AI agents to automate data integration, trigger OLAP calculations, write back planning data, and extract analytics through Jedox's Excel-familiar connected planning platform.
avoid_when: JEDOX USES MOLAP ARCHITECTURE: Jedox is MOLAP (Multidimensional OLAP); automated relational database assumption creates cube_structure_required for understanding Jedox's multidimensional model; automated must understand dimension/element/cube architecture before API use. EXCEL ADD-IN IS PRIMARY UX: Jedox users primarily interact via Excel Add-In; automated purely API-driven assumption may create unexpected user experience differences; automated must understand Excel Add-In context for user-facing workflows. DIMENSION ELEMENTS MUST EXIST: Data written to Jedox cubes requires existing dimension elements; automated dynamic dimension assumption creates element_not_found for new dimension members; automated must pre-create dimension elements before writing planning data. JEDOX AI REQUIRES CONFIGURATION: Jedox AI Accelerator (automated insights) requires specific configuration; automated instant AI insights assumption creates feature_requires_setup; automated must configure Jedox AI before using AI-powered planning features.

auth.notes: Jedox uses Basic Auth + API key for planning REST API. REST API with JSON. Freiburg, Germany HQ. Founded 2002 by Kristian Raue. Products: Jedox Platform (OLAP+planning), AI Accelerator, Data Integration, Jedox Cloud, Jedox Hybrid. SDKs: Python, JS, Java. Excel Add-In is core UX. 2,500+ customers. 140+ countries. AI-infused planning. Competes with Anaplan and Adaptive Insights for connected planning.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Trial for evaluation; production requires enterprise subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual SaaS subscription by user and module; professional services; support tiers
pricing.notes: Freiburg DE. Annual subscription. 2,500+ customers. 140+ countries. Excel-familiar planning.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; OLAP query and write-back APIs throttled per server resources

known_agent_gotchas: MOLAP CUBE NAVIGATION IS COMPLEX: Jedox API navigates multidimensional OLAP cubes with dimension/element hierarchy; automated relational-table assumption creates cube_structure_mismatch; automated must understand Jedox's multidimensional model before API implementation

WRITE-BACK REQUIRES LOCK MANAGEMENT: Multiple simultaneous write-backs can conflict; automated concurrent write assumption creates lock_conflict; automated must implement serialized write-back with conflict handling for concurrent planning scenarios

CALCULATION TRIGGERS ARE EXPLICIT: Jedox cube calculations don't run automatically after data load; automated auto-recalculate assumption creates stale derived values; automated must explicitly trigger calculation after data changes

DIMENSION HIERARCHY TRAVERSAL: Planning hierarchies (P&L, cost center, time) require traversal for roll-up queries; automated flat dimension assumption creates incomplete aggregate values; automated must traverse Jedox dimension hierarchies for correct roll-up calculations

REPORTING VIEWS ARE SEPARATELY CONFIGURED: Jedox reports are pre-built in Excel with Jedox functions; automated API-generated reports assumption creates design mismatch; automated must use Jedox report distribution, not custom report generation
agent_readiness.security_notes: Planning and analytics. GDPR, SOC2. Basic auth. EU/US. Financial planning and OLAP data.

security_score_components.security_notes: FP&A planning. GDPR, SOC2. Basic auth. EU. Financial planning and OLAP data.
